requirement_topic.en: Czechia Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Continental Network
requirement_topic.zh: 捷克并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz大陆电网
requirement_topic.zht: 捷克併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz大陸電網

summary.en: Czechia electricity supply is operated by DSOs (ČEZ Distribuce, E.ON Distribuce, PREdistribuce) at distribution level, with ČEPS as the transmission system operator, and sector oversight by ERÚ (Energy Regulatory Office). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Czech-language documentation is commonly required by DSOs and building authorities (stavební úřad) for permit applications.
summary.zh: 捷克配电层面由DSO（ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce、PREdistribuce）运营，ČEPS为输电系统运营商，ERÚ（能源监管局）负责行业监管。低压电网环境为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成DSO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。DSO及建筑主管机构（stavební úřad）在许可申请中通常要求提供捷克语文件。
summary.zht: 捷克配電層面由DSO（ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce、PREdistribuce）運營，ČEPS為輸電系統運營商，ERÚ（能源監管局）負責行業監管。低壓電網環境為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成DSO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收。DSO及建築主管機構（stavební úřad）在許可申請中通常要求提供捷克語文件。

standards_or_laws: Czech DSO electricity network connection and project acceptance (ČEZ Distribuce, E.ON Distribuce, PREdistribuce — Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy)
ČEPS transmission system operation rules (Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Czechia 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：捷克230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：捷克230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for Czech DSO review. For cold-climate outdoor installations, anti-condensation measures, frost protection, heating elements, and cold-start specifications should be included in project documentation. Czech DSOs and building authorities may require Czech-language documentation for permit submissions.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按捷克DSO审查准备。对于寒冷气候户外安装，项目文件还应包括防冷凝措施、防冻保护、加热元件和冷启动规格。捷克DSO和建筑主管机构在许可申请中可能要求提供捷克语文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按捷克DSO審查準備。對於寒冷氣候戶外安裝，項目文件還應包括防冷凝措施、防凍保護、加熱元件和冷啟動規格。捷克DSO和建築主管機構在許可申請中可能要求提供捷克語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Czech DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Czechia 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Czechia-ready EVSE needs Czech DSO project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Cold-weather and anti-condensation provisions are relevant for outdoor installations in Czechia's continental climate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向捷克的EVSE需要捷克DSO项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。捷克大陆气候户外安装须考虑寒冷天气和防冷凝措施。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向捷克的EVSE需要捷克DSO項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。捷克大陸氣候戶外安裝須考慮寒冷天氣和防冷凝措施。
